failure.message: One or more child tests had errors
One or more child tests had errors
One or more child tests had errors

test-case.name: StartBattle_NoArgOverload_WithNoPartyManagerOrMembers_ReturnsFalse
test-case.output: パーティー管理が設定されていません。

test-case.name: StartBattle_OneArgOverload_WithEmptyPartyMembers_ReturnsFalse
test-case.output: パーティーに傭兵を1人以上編成してください。

test-case.name: StartBattle_OneArgOverload_WithNullPartyMembers_ReturnsFalse
test-case.output: パーティーに傭兵を1人以上編成してください。

test-case.name: StartBattle_TwoArgOverload_WithEmptyParty_ReturnsFalse_EvenWithEnemyEncounterSupplied
test-case.output: パーティーに傭兵を1人以上編成してください。

test-case.name: FirstMonth_WithInsufficientGold_CarriesArrears
test-case.output: Paid 5000 G. Current gold: 0 G

test-case.name: ManualRepayment_IsLimitedByOwnedGold
test-case.output: Paid 5000 G. Current gold: 0 G

test-case.name: StartRun_WithBattleManagerButEmptyParty_ReturnsFalseAndDoesNotThrow
test-case.output: ダンジョンへ入る前に傭兵を編成してください。

test-case.name: StartRun_WithNoBattleManagerOrPartyManagerInScene_ReturnsFalseAndDoesNotThrow
test-case.output: ダンジョン探索に必要な参照が不足しています。

test-case.name: TrySelectDungeon_UnlockedDungeon_ReturnsTrueUpdatesSelectionAndFiresStateChanged
test-case.output: 低級「はじまりの洞窟」を選択しました。

failure.message: One or more child tests had errors

Expected and actual are both <System.Collections.Generic.HashSet`1[System.String]> Values differ at index [0] Expected string length 18 but was 28. Strings differ at index 18. Expected: "item.normal.rank08" But was: "item.normal.rank08.accessory" -----------------------------^

test-case.name: TryHealFull_WhenAffordable_ChargesExactCostAndHeals
test-case.output: Paid 275 G. Current gold: 25 G Healed Healing Tester for 275 G.

test-case.name: TryHealFull_WithInsufficientGold_DoesNotChargeOrHeal
test-case.output: Not enough gold.

test-case.name: LocalContract_HasGuaranteedHireRate_AndAutoRenewsOnDayChange
test-case.output: Paid 30 G. Current gold: 70 G Hired Local Tester. Company mercenaries: 1 Day advanced: 2 Paid 10 G. Current gold: 60 G

test-case.name: LocalContract_WithoutRenewalGold_WaitsButRemainsHired
test-case.output: Paid 30 G. Current gold: 5 G Hired Local Tester. Company mercenaries: 1 Day advanced: 2 Not enough gold.

test-case.name: TryReleaseMercenary_RemovesHiredPartyMember_AndRaisesEvent
test-case.output: Paid 30 G. Current gold: 70 G Hired Local Tester. Company mercenaries: 1

test-case.name: AddItem_CalledTwiceForSameItem_StacksIntoSingleEntry
test-case.output: Added item: Stackable Ore x3 Added item: Stackable Ore x2

test-case.name: SellEquipmentInstance_ValidUnlockedInstance_ReturnsTrue_RemovesIt_AndCreditsExactGold
test-case.output: Gained 120 G. Current gold: 620 G

test-case.name: TryRemoveItem_DrainsStackToZero_RemovesEntryFromItems
test-case.output: Added item: Stackable Ore x3 Added item: Stackable Ore x2

test-case.output: Added item: Stackable Ore x3

test-case.name: TryRemoveItem_PartialAmount_LeavesRemainderAndKeepsStack
test-case.output: Added item: Stackable Ore x3 Added item: Stackable Ore x2

test-case.name: EarnedGold_RaisesLevelAndKeepsRemainder

test-case.name: SpendingGold_DoesNotIncreaseLifetimeEarnings

test-case.name: DungeonCompletion_AdvancesBaseDayPlusEventDelays

test-case.name: TotalGoldEarned_ReadsMerchantDataLifetimeEarnings
